title: Rules of imputation of payment
doc_html:
Art. 1896.  Rules of imputation of payment

If an obligor owes more than one obligation subject to compensation, the rules of imputation of payment must be applied.

Acts 1984, No. 331, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1985.

Art. 1896.  Rules of imputation of payment
If an obligor owes more than one obligation subject to compensation, the rules of imputation of payment must be applied.
Acts 1984, No. 331, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1985.
